title: Dívka v modrém
writer: Felix de la Cámara, Otakar Vávra, Oldrich Nový
actors: Lída Baarová, Oldrich Nový, Ruzena Slemrová
plot: Many local dignitaries are gathered at an auction organized by the notary Dr Jan Karas (Oldrich Nový) at Lucín castle to sell off the belongings of the late count. Most interest is aroused by a portrait of a beautiful noble girl, ...
